nation: Lac des Mille Lacs First Nation
economic_notes: First Nation operates Savanne River Resort, Nezaadiikaang Economic Development LP, Dallan Holdings LP (sawmill yard maintenance/equipment rentals), Dallan Fort William LP, Stoneman Contracting LP (TransCanada Energy maintenance), Bolt Utilities, Glow Transformers, Giiwedin Environmental Services. Holds 25% interest in Lot 251-3 Development LP. Received 26% of recurring revenue from ISC (down from 38% prior year). COVID-19 segment tracked separately.
notes: Fiscal year 2022 (ended March 31, 2022). Three entities consolidated: 1913563 Ontario Inc., Nezaadiikaang General Contracting GP Inc., Nezaadiikaang Economic Development LP. Multiple government business partnerships accounted for under modified equity method including Dallan Holdings LP, Dallan Fort William LP, Stoneman Contracting LP. Flood settlement member distributions of $840,000 sitting in accounts payable. First Nation not in compliance with First Nations Financial Transparency Act posting deadline. COVID segment tracked as separate department. OSR calculated as total revenue $15,397,641 minus total government transfers $4,964,301 = $10,433,340. No remuneration schedule included in extracted text. Transmission Line Phase II asset of $2,326,155 not yet in use and not being amortized.
